title: Inkwell.
kicker: 57 values · warm paper to ink · AAA throughout
tagline: Ink on warm paper, bronze only where it matters. A color system for agentic products that would rather be trusted than noticed — measured to WCAG AAA and calm about it.

principles.title: Everyone else ships cold.
principles.body: The industry defaults to blue light on black glass. Inkwell is paper, ink and one metal — it reads senior because it is calm, and calm is scarce.

principles.title: One metal, no neon.
principles.body: Bronze is the only interactive voice. If it is bronze, it clicks; if it doesn't click, it is never bronze. Scarcity is what keeps an accent premium.

principles.title: Verdicts, not decoration.
principles.body: Moss, ochre and clay speak only about state — succeeded, needs a human, failed. A running process is never green. Green is a verdict, not a mood.

principles.title: Dark is a remap, not a negative.
principles.body: Ink mode reassigns the same thirteen neutrals — nothing inverted, nothing invented after the fact. Both themes are first-class citizens.

rampNotes.neutral: warm gray, paper to ink — every step carried verbatim from the source
rampNotes.bronze: the only interactive voice — 400–700 verbatim from the source

roleNotes.bg.base: The page. Everything sits on this.
roleNotes.accent.focus-ring: The focus indicator — ≥ 3:1 against every canvas.
